data.name: 20260101000000_baseline.sql
data.summary: Baseline schema migration that provisions the entire Vayl backend: extensions (pgcrypto, uuid-ossp, pg_cron), helper functions, and the 10 core tables (user_profiles, couples, pairing_codes, curated_sessions, desire_ratings, desire_matches, card_progress, assessment_responses/results, couple_session

data.name: user_profiles
data.summary: Per-user profile keyed by auth_id, storing onboarding state, NM flavor/stage, pairing code, couple linkage, orientation and role preferences. The pivot table linking Supabase auth identities to couple-scoped data.

data.name: couples
data.summary: Couple record joining two user_profiles (user_a, user_b) with a shared safe word and a matches_revealed flag; the central scoping entity that most RLS policies and foreign keys reference.

data.name: pairing_codes
data.summary: Short-lived invite codes for two-device pairing, tracking creator, expiry, and who claimed the code into which couple. RLS allows the creator to manage their row and a non-creator to claim it.

data.name: curated_sessions
data.summary: Two-device curated card-session state: deck/variant, card list, per-card and global timers, per-partner presence/bandwidth/consent flags, reveal state, and safe-word usage. A unique partial index enforces one open session per couple.

data.name: desire_ratings
data.summary: Per-user rating of an individual desire_item, the raw input that feeds Desire Map match computation.

data.name: desire_matches
data.summary: Computed alignment between partners on a desire item: alignment level, each partner's value, gap size, and an optional bridge card. The couple-facing output of the Desire Map.

data.name: card_progress
data.summary: Per-couple status of each card (e.g. discussed/skipped), used to track deck progression across a couple's sessions.

data.name: couple_session_records
data.summary: Historical log of completed couple sessions with start/end timestamps and count of cards discussed.

data.name: assessment_responses
data.summary: Per-user raw answers to onboarding assessment questions, keyed by question_key.

data.name: assessment_results
data.summary: Per-user derived assessment results (result_key/result_value pairs) computed from assessment_responses.

data.name: 20260616223000_p5d_revoke_anon_default_privileges.sql
data.summary: Security-hardening migration (P5d) that revokes the anon role from default privileges on future tables, functions, and sequences in the public schema, and drops a residual anon EXECUTE grant on set_curated_sessions_updated_at(), closing the future-object exposure gap left by P5b.

data.name: 20260617000000_desire_map_backend.sql
data.summary: Desire Map backend migration that creates the desire_map_status table (per-couple track + per-partner completion + full-reveal gating) and extends desire_ratings (rating check constraint) and desire_matches (is_free_reveal, revealed_at) to support the reveal flow.

data.name: desire_map_status
data.summary: Per-couple Desire Map progress: which track, each partner's completion timestamp, whether the full reveal is unlocked, and a waiting-state marker. Drives the gated reveal experience.

data.name: 20260617120000_monetization_entitlements.sql
data.summary: Monetization migration that creates the service-role-only entitlements ledger (couple_id, product_id, is_active, purchased_by) with RLS and a couple_id index, and adds the denormalized access_tier / core_unlocked_at / is_founding_member cache columns to couples.

data.name: entitlements
data.summary: Service-role-only purchase ledger granting a couple an entitlement (product_id, is_active, expires_at, purchased_by). Source of truth for the couple's paid access tier; never exposed to clients.

data.name: 20260617130000_entitlement_payer_portable_resolution.sql
data.summary: Defines two payer-portable resolution functions: resolve_couple_access_tier (reader returning 'core'/'free' from active entitlements matched by couple_id OR purchaser identity) and recompute_couple_entitlement (writer that refreshes the couples access_tier/founding/unlocked-at cache from the ledger)

config.name: assessment_questions.json
config.summary: Seed bank of ENM-readiness assessment questions (scale and multi-select), each tagged with a domain, weight, and sort order, consumed via ContentLoader.loadAssessmentQuestions(). Several entries are flagged as placeholders pending validated content.

config.name: cards.json
config.summary: Card-session content deck: education, prompt, and educationPrompt cards keyed to a category_id, with speaking-turn, difficulty, sensitivity, and free/paid gating. Loaded through ContentLoader.loadCards() to drive the couple card experience.

config.name: categories.json
config.summary: Category taxonomy for the Learn/card content (communication, boundaries, intimacy, etc.) with SF Symbol icons, phase grouping, card counts, and unlock gating. Loaded via ContentLoader.loadCategories() to organize and gate content sections.

config.name: desire_items.json
config.summary: Desire Map item catalog: per-item name, description, category, sensitivity, track membership (curious/established), and track-specific answer scales. Decoded into the DesireItem model via ContentLoader.loadDesireItems() to populate the Desire Map rater.

list.name: App & Composition Root
list.description: SwiftUI @main entry (VaylApp), AppShell/AppRootView routing, SwiftData ModelContainer wiring, the App/Theme design-token system, and app-level config (entitlements, Info.plist, StoreKit catalog).

list.name: Design System & Effects
list.description: Reusable SwiftUI component library (cards, buttons, inputs, navigation, progress, text), Metal/SpriteKit visual effects and shaders, brand splash/app-icon views, and the xcasset color/symbol catalogs they render.

list.name: Core Models, Persistence & Content
list.description: Pure data-shape structs and enums, the SwiftData persistence container, and the bundled JSON content (card decks, categories, assessment, desire items) those models decode at runtime.

list.name: Core Services
list.description: Network/IO services injected into Stores — Supabase client, PairingService, SyncManager, Auth, ContentLoader, session services — plus on-device diagnostic/debug overlays.

list.name: Onboarding Experience
list.description: The animated two-device onboarding feature — Canvas, VaylDirector phase engine, per-phase Views, Sequencers, table-surface choreography, and its Stores/Models (largest feature module, isolated for its size).

list.name: Feature Modules
list.description: Per-feature View/Store/Model modules for Home, Pulse, Pairing, Sessions, Desire Map, Monetization, Learn, Map, Auth, Play, Progress, and Settings.

list.name: Backend Edge Functions
list.description: Supabase Deno/TypeScript edge functions (create-pair, get-partner, grant-entitlement, lookup-code, rapid-task, compute-desire-matches) and their Deno/npm config plus supabase/config.toml.

list.name: Database Schema
list.description: Postgres schema as Supabase migrations and the tables they provision (user_profiles, couples, pairing_codes, curated_sessions, desire_ratings/matches, entitlements, assessment, card_progress, and more).

list.name: Tests
list.description: VaylTests unit tests verifying client logic — enum ordering, ContextPhase options, GettingStarted step resolution, and Monte-fan layout geometry.

file:Vayl/Features/Onboarding/Renders/An.name: AnimatedSignature.swift

file:Vayl/Features/Onboarding/Renders/De.name: DealPointView.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Onboarding/Renders/De.summary: Stateless render of the OB deal point — the table-horizon origin from which all onboarding cards launch, its glow intensity driven by VaylDirector.

file:Vayl/Features/Onboarding/Renders/Pr.name: ProjectedTextView.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Onboarding/Renders/Pr.summary: Stateless render of the dealer's voice — text typed character-by-character onto the felt at the table horizon, driven by VaylDirector's projected text state.

file:Vayl/Features/Onboarding/Store/Onbo.name: OnboardingStore.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Onboarding/Store/Onbo.summary: Observable MainActor store that commits completed OnboardingData to SwiftData, persisting every field onto UserProfile and mirroring displayName/appMode into AppState.

file:Vayl/Features/Pairing/PairingInvite.name: PairingInviteView.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Pairing/PairingInvite.summary: Person-A pairing View that generates an invite code and waits for a partner to join; display-only with all logic delegated to PairingStore.

file:Vayl/Features/Pairing/PairingJoinVi.name: PairingJoinView.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Pairing/PairingJoinVi.summary: Person-B pairing View where the user enters a partner's code to join; display-only with all logic delegated to PairingStore.joinWithCode.

file:Vayl/Features/Pairing/PairingSettin.name: PairingSettingsView.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Pairing/PairingSettin.summary: Partner-linking settings screen showing current link state and surfacing the invite/join actions when unlinked, reading link state from AppState.

file:Vayl/Features/Pairing/PairingStore..name: PairingStore.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Pairing/PairingStore..summary: Observable MainActor store owning the device-pairing flow — generate/regenerate/join/poll lifecycle over PairingService, persisting the couple link to SwiftData and mirroring it into AppState.

file:Vayl/Features/Play/PlayView.swift.name: PlayView.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Play/PlayView.swift.summary: Placeholder Play tab View; in DEBUG builds it hosts a temporary stub-session button that exercises the curated-session insert path against Supabase.

file:Vayl/Features/Progress/ProgressDash.name: ProgressDashboardView.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Progress/ProgressDash.summary: Progress dashboard View showing exploration score, per-category breakdown, and recent activity, sourced from DataStore's streak and session records.

file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/CheckInShell.sw.name: CheckInShell.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/CheckInShell.sw.summary: Full-screen container for the Pulse check-in: PulseGraph fills the top 60% (always visible) while DailyCheckInView slides up in the bottom 40%, with camera bindings owned by PulseWidget.

file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/DailyCheckInVie.name: DailyCheckInView.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/DailyCheckInVie.summary: The 5-question daily check-in panel rendered inside CheckInShell; each pill answer moves liveScore so the live dot animates on the graph above, returning a PulseEntry on completion.

file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/PulseCanvasScro.name: PulseCanvasScrollView.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/PulseCanvasScro.summary: Pure SwiftUI two-axis ScrollView wrapper for PulseGraph that anchors to the most-recent entry and locks the outer dashboard scroll while a touch is on the graph.

file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/PulseDotSummary.name: PulseDotSummary.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/PulseDotSummary.summary: Overlay View presenting a single Pulse entry's detail via a spectrum 'burn' that expands from the tapped dot, with ember particles and a smart above/below flip; dismiss collapses the burn back into the dot.

file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/PulseFullView.s.name: PulseFullView.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/PulseFullView.s.summary: Full Pulse history screen (stub) for the Me|Us tab — owns window selection and camera state, hosts a scrollable PulseGraph plus an insights placeholder and a full-screen dot burn summary overlay.

file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/PulseGraph.swif.name: PulseGraph.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/PulseGraph.swif.summary: Core drawing primitive for the Pulse capacity timeline — a breathing spectrum EKG line with tier guide lines, tappable tier badges, animated welding sparks on the live segment, and an empty-state heartbeat demo.

file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/PulseSheetView..name: PulseSheetView.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/PulseSheetView..summary: Sheet presented from the Pulse home widget — mirrors the widget header, shows streak/avg-tier/trend stats, a window selector and graph card, and a single 'Open in Map' exit.

file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/PulseWidget.swi.name: PulseWidget.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/PulseWidget.swi.summary: Compact Pulse timeline widget for the Home dashboard — reads entries from PulseStore, renders a chrome-free graph with a floating tier header, and launches the check-in cover and full-history sheet.

file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/Store/PulseStor.name: PulseStore.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/Store/PulseStor.summary: Observable store owning the local list of daily PulseEntry check-ins, persisting them to UserDefaults with one-entry-per-day dedup and DEBUG preview seeding.

file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/TierGuideSheet..name: TierGuideSheet.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Pulse/TierGuideSheet..summary: Explanatory sheet presented when a Pulse tier badge is tapped, describing the four capacity tiers — Expansive, Sovereign, Protective, Contracted.

file:Vayl/Features/Sessions/Debug/Presen.name: PresenceDebugView.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Sessions/Debug/Presen.summary: DEBUG-only two-device harness (store + view) that joins a Supabase couple channel via RealtimeSessionService and tracks presence join/leave deltas; throwaway scaffold ahead of the real AirlockStore.

file:Vayl/Features/Sessions/SessionPlan..name: SessionPlan.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Sessions/SessionPlan..summary: SwiftData @Model for a curated couple session plan — ordered card ids with optional per-card and global timers, preset/LDR flags, and a hardcoded stub for early two-device verification.

file:Vayl/Features/Sessions/SessionStore.name: SessionStore.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Sessions/SessionStore.summary: Brain of the card session flow — owns card navigation, records per-card results, and persists the completed CardSession, CardResults and DeckProgress to SwiftData, then enqueues a Supabase sync.

file:Vayl/Features/Sessions/SessionView..name: SessionView.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Sessions/SessionView..summary: Thin render-only card session view driven entirely by SessionStore — shows the current card, progress pips, skip/bookmark/discussed controls, and a session-complete summary.

file:Vayl/Features/Settings/SettingsView.name: SettingsView.swift
file:Vayl/Features/Settings/SettingsView.summary: Settings screen with profile, partner pairing, appearance, privacy, data export and danger-zone sections, plus DEBUG-only presence-debug and logout-reset entries.

config:Vayl/Resources/Decks/deck-index.j.name: deck-index.json
config:Vayl/Resources/Decks/deck-index.j.summary: Manifest listing the available bundled deck content ids — currently just 'the-opener'.

config:Vayl/Resources/Decks/the-opener.j.name: the-opener.json
config:Vayl/Resources/Decks/the-opener.j.summary: Authored card-deck content file for 'The Opener' deck — the ordered prompt cards a couple plays in a session.

config:Vayl/Vayl.entitlements.name: Vayl.entitlements
config:Vayl/Vayl.entitlements.summary: App capability entitlements enabling Sign in with Apple (Default) and complete file data protection (NSFileProtectionComplete).

config:Vayl/Vayl.plist.name: Vayl.plist
config:Vayl/Vayl.plist.summary: Info.plist supplying Supabase URL/anon-key build settings and registering the bundled Clash Display, Switzer, Zodiak, Volkhov and IBM Plex Mono fonts via UIAppFonts.

config:Vayl/Vayl.storekit.name: Vayl.storekit
config:Vayl/Vayl.storekit.summary: StoreKit test configuration defining the single non-consumable 'Vayl Core Lifetime' product (com.vayl.core.lifetime, $24.99) backing the paywall.

file:VaylTests/CandleIntensityTests.swif.name: CandleIntensityTests.swift
file:VaylTests/CandleIntensityTests.swif.summary: Unit tests asserting CandleIntensity's ordered cases match the experience-row slots and map to the correct NMStage values.

file:VaylTests/ContextOptionTests.swift.name: ContextOptionTests.swift
file:VaylTests/ContextOptionTests.swift.summary: Unit tests for the reason-based ContextPhase redesign — verifies cell option counts, solo single-anchoring, exploring/experienced set sharing, register derivation, and full RelationshipContext reachability.

file:VaylTests/GettingStartedTests.swift.name: GettingStartedTests.swift
file:VaylTests/GettingStartedTests.swift.summary: Unit tests for GettingStarted.resolve — checks step ordering and active/done/locked states across paired/unpaired and map-completion permutations.

file:VaylTests/MonteRowGeometryTests.swi.name: MonteRowGeometryTests.swift
file:VaylTests/MonteRowGeometryTests.swi.summary: Unit test verifying AppLayout.monteFanLayout produces an upright center card, mirror-symmetric outer angles/offsets, and a fan that fits within the screen width.
